'''thafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nullifyingly|nullifyingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nullifyingly|nullifyingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thafate|thafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafatesher|thafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafatesherĂ«m|thafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafatero|thafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafateshĂ«|thafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafateshĂ«m|thafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafatero|gokithafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafateshĂ«|gokithafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafateshĂ«m|gokithafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafankerom|gothafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafankeshĂ«|gothafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafankeshĂ«m|gothafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafankeya|gothafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafaterom|thafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafatemu|thafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafateya|thafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafaterom|gokithafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafatemu|gokithafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafateya|gokithafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafafate|thafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafafatesher|thafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafafatesherĂ«m|thafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafafatero|thafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafafateshĂ«|thafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafafateshĂ«m|thafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafafatero|gokithafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafafateshĂ«|gokithafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafafateshĂ«m|gokithafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafafankerom|gothafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafafankeshĂ«|gothafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafafankeshĂ«m|gothafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafafankeya|gothafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafafaterom|thafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafafatemu|thafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafafateya|thafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafafaterom|gokithafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafafatemu|gokithafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafafateya|gokithafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠte|thĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠtesher|thĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠtero|thĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠtero|gokithĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠtemu|thĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠfĂŠteya|thĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠterom|gokithĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠfĂŠteya|gokithĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thaffafte|thaffafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thaffaftesher|thaffaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaffaftesherĂ«m|thaffaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaffaftero|thaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thaffafteshĂ«|thaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaffafteshĂ«m|thaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaffaftero|gokithaffaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithaffafteshĂ«|gokithaffafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaffafteshĂ«m|gokithaffafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothaffafnkerom|gothaffafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothaffafnkeshĂ«|gothaffafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothaffafnkeshĂ«m|gothaffafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothaffafnkeya|gothaffafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thaffafterom|thaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thaffaftemu|thaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thaffafteya|thaffafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithaffafterom|gokithaffafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithaffaftemu|gokithaffaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithaffafteya|gokithaffafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
